title: Parker-Hannifin (PH) to Post Q2 Earnings: What's in Store?
text: Parker-Hannifin (PH) performance is likely to have benefited from strong demand across end markets, supply-chain management and effective pricing. High raw material costs might have weighed on its performance.

title: Parker to Announce Fiscal 2023 Second Quarter Earnings on February 2nd; Conference Call and Webcast Scheduled for 11 a.m. Eastern
text: CLEVELAND, Jan. 23, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Parker Hannifin Corporation (NYSE: PH), the global leader in motion and control technologies, today announced that it will release its fiscal 2023 second quarter earnings before the market opens on Thursday, February 2, 2023, followed by a conference call at 11:00 a.m., Eastern time. During the call, the company will discuss fiscal 2023 second quarter results and respond to questions from institutional investors and security analysts. The conference call will be webcast simultaneously on Parker's investor information website at  www.phstock.com  with an accompanying slide presentation. The webcast will be archived on the site and available for replay later that day.

title: 3 Stocks Primed for High Dividend Growth
text: Most income-oriented investors focus almost exclusively on the current dividend yield of stocks to decide whether to purchase them. However, the payout ratio and the growth prospects of the company are equally important, as they are the determinants of future dividend growth.

title: Is This Dividend King a Bond Substitute?
text: When thinking about an uncertain investing future, the most prudent course is to buy bonds, which are loans to governments and financially strong businesses. However, bonds normally have fixed terms and fixed yields, exposing them to inflation and opportunity-cost risks.
